title: linaria tournefortii subsp. glabrescens
intro: Linaria tournefortii subsp. glabrescens, also known as the yellow toadflax, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Linaria tournefortii subsp. glabrescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
